_doc: Tracked exceptions to the file-size budget. Each entry must have a justification. New files that exceed the fail threshold MUST be split, not added here. See scripts/architecture/file-budget.mjs and docs/architecture/quality-foundation.md.

exempt.reason: Primary chat state. Reducers being extracted incrementally — see commits abb27593..32927506.
Black-box tests for the primary chat state. Tests scale with state.
Frontend type barrel. Largest types/* file; per-domain split is the long-term plan but is itself a behavior-changing refactor.
Chat prompt composer (2.4k lines). Hosts slash/at-mention/file UI; sub-components exist but parent owns state.
Tool call timeline view (1.5k lines). Sub-panels embedded inline; refactor to children is planned.
Sound pack definitions. Data-only, no logic density.
Frontend API barrel (1.6k). 14 typed invoke wrappers; per-domain split is the long-term plan.
Chat page (1.8k). Was 4.6k+ before refactor; further split is feature work, not hygiene.
Plugins marketplace (2.6k). Multiple sub-tabs in one file by design.
Settings page (1.9k). Tabbed content lives inline to preserve scroll state.
Teams page (1.6k). Tabbed content + team detail.
CLI session lifecycle owner (2.8k lines). Single actor is the design — splitting would break the mailbox invariants.
Protocol parsing (3.4k lines). Pure data mapping; split is a behavior-preserving refactor tracked in quality-foundation ADR.
Tauri command surface for sessions (2.8k). Largest Tauri command file; per-command split is the plan.
Diagnostics commands (1.8k). Includes ad-hoc inspection helpers accumulated over time.
All BusEvent variants + DTOs (2.5k). BusEvent is the largest enum; per-domain model modules are the long-term plan.
Run history persistence (710 lines).
EventWriter (replayable A-class events). 667 lines; splitting would scatter IO + serde logic.
CLI session discovery + import (2k+). Pre-existing coupling to agent/* (see direction-check KNOWN_VIOLATIONS).
Web server module entry (699 lines). Mostly re-exports + state wiring.
Web server request dispatch (1.5k+). One large router; per-feature split planned.
